--- SOURCE 1: Microbial electrosynthesis: opportunities for microbial pure cultures ---
URL: https://www.cell.com/trends/biotechnology/fulltext/S0167-7799(24)00033-7

SUMMARY:
Microbial electrosynthesis (MES) is an emerging technology that couples renewable electricity to microbial production processes.

URL: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1385894725047163

SUMMARY:
This study introduces a novel miniaturised reactor, modelled after a state-of-the-art flat-plate directed-flow-through bioelectrochemical reactor (DFBR).

SUMMARY:

enriched_points.expanded_content: Key studies include innovative reactor designs and advancements in microbial electrosynthesis, highlighting efficient electron transfer and CO2 conversion processes.
Notable articles explore microbial electrosynthesis's potential in renewable energy and sustainable chemical production, emphasizing its role in synthetic biology and carbon reduction.
Recommended readings include reviews on microbial electrosynthesis systems, reactor technologies, and their implications for bioproduction and environmental sustainability.
